description_long: This is a wooden bunk bed featuring two stacked single beds, each with a simple, natural wood frame. The upper and lower bunks are both equipped with white mattresses and plaid-patterned blankets, with the top blanket in blue and the bottom in a mix of blue and black. The bed frame includes vertical slats on the sides for safety and a sturdy ladder attached to the right side for access to the upper bunk. Both bunks have headboards and footboards, constructed from the same light-colored wood as the rest of the frame. The overall design is functional and minimal, suitable for shared sleeping spaces such as dormitories, hostels, or urban apartments.
description: A light wood bunk bed with two single beds, plaid blankets, and a side ladder. The design is minimal and functional, with slatted safety rails and visible headboards and footboards.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bunks, the side ladder, and the plaid bedding on each bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the beds, the slatted safety rails, and the full width of the frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite side of the bed, with both headboards and footboards visible.
description_view_3: End view showing the width of the beds, the pillows, and the alignment of the mattresses.
